revision.comment: don't show second invisible image invocation in MediaViewer
revision.text:
{{#ifeq:{{{float}}}|center|
}}
{{#if:{{{imagemap|}}}|{{{imagemap}}}|[[File:{{{image}}}|{{{image-width|300}}}px|alt={{{alt|}}}|{{{caption}}}]]}}
{{{annotations}}}
{{#if:{{{imagemap|}}}|{{{imagemap}}}|[[Image:{{{image}}}|{{{image-width|300}}}px|frameless|class=noviewer|alt={{{alt|}}}{{#if:{{{link|}}}|{{!}}{{{link}}}}}]]}}
{{#if:{{{image|}}}|{{magnify icon|link=File:{{{image}}}}}}}{{{caption}}}
{{#ifeq:{{{float}}}|center|
}}{{#if:{{{image- style|}}}|[[Category:Pages screwed up by automated editing]]}} {{documentation}}

revision.comment: Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates.

#redirect[[:en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects A]]
#redirect[[:en:Template:Annotated image]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects A]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "↵[[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects A]]" to " <noinclude>[[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects A]]</noinclude>"
revision.text: #redirect[[:en:Template:Annotated image]] <noinclude>[[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects A]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: redirect unused template to en:
revision.text: #redirect [[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects A]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]]" to "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]"
revision.text: #redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects A]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]" to "<noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude>"
revision.text: #redirect <noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude> [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects A]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Removing from [[Category:Qq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
